context: Evaluates whether the agent implements a correct Kubernetes admission control policy in Rego using the kube-mgmt pattern: deny contains msg, and input.request.object for the Pod spec.

checklist.name: deny contains msg pattern
checklist.description: The policy uses `deny contains msg if { ... }` to collect violation messages

checklist.name: Checks input.request.kind.kind
checklist.description: The deny rule checks `input.request.kind.kind == "Pod"` to scope the policy to Pods only

checklist.name: Deny rule for privileged containers
checklist.description: The deny rule iterates over `input.request.object.spec.containers` and triggers when `container.securityContext.privileged == true`

checklist.name: Tests pass
checklist.description: All tests pass when running `opa test . -v`
